reviews.comment:
Cargue combustible y estaba en viaje, mí madre fue a los sanitarios y se olvidó la cartera en el baño, no se había dado cuenta y la recuperamos gracias al personal y al encargado muy atento , educado y responsable con el nombre de Edgardo. Les agradecemos mucho toda la atención recibida.

(Translated by Google)
I filled up with fuel and was on my way when my mother went to the restroom and forgot her purse. She hadn't realized it, and we recovered it thanks to the staff and the very attentive, polite, and responsible manager named Edgardo. We are very grateful for all the help we received.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXaklYZEhREAE

Poor service. There's no shelter since we went by motorbike and it was pouring rain.

reviews.comment:
Los baños un lujo. Dejamos el auto un par de horas inclusive porque no encontrábamos lugar en la calle. Despues cargamos nafta. Unos capos los muchachos que trabajan ahí.

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms were fantastic. We even left the car there for a couple of hours because we couldn't find parking on the street. Then we filled up with gas. The guys who work there are great.
